# Bit Manipulation → Scale

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Bit Manipulation → Scale

Scale

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  By default performs an arithmetic shift operation on a 40-bit
Vector Scale                      source into either 32-bit or 40-bit destination determined by the

register type.
                                  By default performs an arithmetic shift operation on a 72-bit
Vector Scale Long                 source into either 64-bit or 72-bit destination determined by the
                                  register type.
                                  By default performs an arithmetic shift operation on two 40-bit
Vector Scale and Pack             sources and packing the high part into either 32-bit or 40-bit
                                  destination according to the register type.
